changes: fix(telegram): webhook screen .env locator used __file__ parents (resolves to site-packages when pip-installed) -> now CWD-based via apps.lib.env_manager.find_env_path, matching the CLI/start_daemon convention (cwd=project root)
fix(telegram): webhook screen no longer shows contradictory 'Local (.env)' + '.env not found'; distinct 'Environment variables (no .env found)' mode with no edit button when no .env is present
Added apps.lib.env_manager.find_env_path (shared with CLI _find_env_path) + regression tests
notes: Patch to 7.8.0: the 🌐 Webhook edit button was missing and the screen reported '.env not found' for pip-installed deployments because the .env path was derived from the package install location instead of the runtime CWD.
